_instructions: One file per location/area. Fill in all fields. Delete this key.
name: Display Name (e.g. Cell Block C)
type: cell_block | yard | cafeteria | infirmary | solitary | warden_office | workshop | chapel | tunnel | guard_station | roof | visitor_room
atmosphere: 2-3 sentences describing how this place looks, smells, sounds. Used for ambient dialogue and player journal entries.

unlockConditions: Story flags or items required to access this area

importantObjects.name: Object Name
importantObjects.description: What is it, what does it do?

ambientDetails: Specific atmospheric touches: dripping water, distant shouting, flickering lights
loreNotes: Any hidden history, secrets, or world-building facts about this place
